free_text: -The interaction of neutrons with sodium in the
Accelerated proton beam on Li-7 target.
.Pure sodium, made under an argon atmosphere, in a
cylindrical Al can of thickness 0.04 cm. Sample was
4.5 cm diameter, wieghed 70.89 gm, impurities less
Pulse shape discimination of neutrons and
in a glass cylinder, 5 cm diameter, 6.4 cm long.
